content: Primary care strengthening strategies include: (1) Patient-Centered Medical Home (PCMH) model - team-based care with care coordinators, extended hours, care management for complex patients; (2) Panel management - proactive outreach for preventive services and chronic disease monitoring; (3) Integrated behavioral health - co-located mental health providers addressing depression, anxiety, substance use; (4) Community health workers - extending reach for underserved populations; (5) Payment reform - per-member-per-month care management fees alongside visit-based payments. Studies show PCMH implementation reduces ED visits by 15-20%, hospitalizations by 10-15%, and improves preventive service delivery.
